column1: # partitions.csv — custom 32 MB layout for ESP32-S3-WatchFace
# Total flash on the Waveshare ESP32-S3-Touch-AMOLED-2.06 = 32 MB (0x2000000).
# The flashed app .bin is ~1.9 MB; the 8 MB app slots give ~6 MB headroom and
# keep OTA possible (two slots). The remainder is a large on-flash FAT filesystem.
# CRITICAL — why these offsets are NOT free to change:
#   The ESP32 Arduino build flashes fixed addresses that the partition table must
#   match
column2: or the board boots to a BLACK SCREEN (valid table

column1: #   where the bootloader looks for it):
#       0x8000  partition table
#       0xe000  boot_app0.bin   -> so otadata MUST be at 0xe000
#       0x10000 the app .bin    -> so app0 MUST start at exactly 0x10000
#   That pins the head: nvs (0x9000..0xe000 = 20 KB) + otadata (0xe000..0x10000)
#   then app0 at 0x10000. NVS therefore can't be enlarged past 20 KB here — a
#   bigger nvs would push app0 off 0x10000 and brick the boot (the earlier
#   black-screen bug). For more NVS
column2: add a SECOND nvs partition AFTER the apps and

column1: #   point the code at it; the head nvs stays 20 KB.
# Other rules: app partitions start on a 64 KB (0x10000) boundary; nothing exceeds
# 0x2000000. This table fills the 32 MB exactly.
# Name
nvs
otadata
app0
app1
ffat
